Breach_Description: Passive breach of 10% single issuer limit - Tech Corp B position reached 10.8% of NAV due to market appreciation
Cause: Market movement caused position to exceed limit without active trading
Remediation_Action: Position reduced to 9.5% within 3 business days as permitted under passive breach provisions
Lessons_Learned: Enhanced daily monitoring thresholds set at 9% to provide early warning buffer

Breach_Description: 5/10/40 rule aggregate breach - sum of >5% positions reached 41.2% of NAV
Cause: Multiple bond positions appreciated simultaneously following ECB rate decision
Remediation_Action: Rebalanced portfolio within 5 business days; aggregate reduced to 37.8%
Lessons_Learned: Implemented automated 38% aggregate warning threshold in compliance monitoring system

Breach_Description: Late filing of semi-annual report - filed 3 days after regulatory deadline
Cause: Delay in receiving auditor sign-off due to staff absence at audit firm
Remediation_Action: Filed report immediately upon receipt; formal apology letter sent to CSSF
Lessons_Learned: Added 2-week buffer to reporting timeline; secondary audit contact established

Breach_Description: Temporary leverage breach - commitment method leverage reached 205% vs 200% limit
Cause: Unscheduled drawdown on revolving credit facility coincided with NAV decline
Remediation_Action: Repaid portion of credit facility within 3 business days to bring leverage to 188%
Lessons_Learned: Implemented pre-drawdown leverage impact assessment; added 10% buffer to internal limit

Breach_Description: Passive breach of 10% issuer limit - Issuer Y position reached 10.4% following share price surge
Cause: Rapid market appreciation in Chinese tech sector
Remediation_Action: Monitoring position; plan to reduce within permitted timeframe if market does not self-correct
Lessons_Learned: Reviewing concentration risk in EM tech names; considering lower internal limits

Breach_Description: Annex IV reporting submitted with incorrect leverage calculation
Cause: Manual data entry error in gross method leverage calculation spreadsheet
Remediation_Action: Resubmitted corrected Annex IV report to CSSF within 5 business days
Lessons_Learned: Automated leverage calculation integrated with portfolio management system to eliminate manual errors

Breach_Description: Delayed filing of suspicious transaction report - filed 2 days after internal detection
Cause: MLRO was on leave and deputy MLRO was not promptly notified
Remediation_Action: STR filed immediately upon deputy MLRO notification; internal escalation procedures reviewed
Lessons_Learned: Revised MLRO absence cover procedures; automated alerts now route to both MLRO and deputy simultaneously

Breach_Description: Counterparty exposure to single OTC derivative counterparty reached 5.3% of NAV vs 5% limit
Cause: FX forward settlement delay caused temporary overlap of old and new positions with same counterparty
Remediation_Action: Closed out maturing position on T+1; exposure returned to 3.1%
Lessons_Learned: Added settlement risk buffer to counterparty exposure calculations; pre-trade compliance check enhanced
